_comment: Dataset version manifest. Every number in the writeup must be reproducible from the versions pinned here. Refresh policy: pinned snapshots + explicit `python code/download_data.py --update <key>`; never silent auto-refresh. Run `python code/download_data.py --check-updates` to poll for newer versions.
_license_fields: Each dataset carries: `license` (upstream license), `attribution` (the credit line any reuse must carry), and `redistribution` — one of: `redistributable` (snapshot committed in-repo, upstream license permits redistribution), `redistributable-noncommercial` (committed, but non-commercial terms apply — kept OUT of the ODbL-licensed outputs; see LICENSE-DATA), `fetch-by-script` (not committed; download_data.py or the pipeline fetches it), `on-request` (obtain from the upstream provider directly). Repo-wide layout: code = MIT (LICENSE), IM3-derived facility datasets = ODbL 1.0 (LICENSE-DATA), FracTracker-derived files = non-commercial with mandatory credit.

im3_atlas.name: IM3 Open Source Data Center Atlas (PNNL/DOE)
im3_atlas.attribution: IM3/PNNL Open Source Data Center Atlas, DOI 10.57931/3017294 (ODbL 1.0; OpenStreetMap-derived — (c) OpenStreetMap contributors)
im3_atlas.redistribution_notes: ODbL is share-alike: every derivative facility dataset in data/derived-data/ and web-data/ is published under ODbL 1.0 (LICENSE-DATA), not MIT.
im3_atlas.citation: IM3/PNNL, Open Source Data Center Atlas, MSD-LIVE Data Repository, v2026.02.09 (2026), doi:10.57931/3017294
im3_atlas.notes: MSD-Live gates file bytes behind an authenticated S3 flow; the committed CSV in data/raw-data/ is the pinned snapshot. Version detection still works via the public InvenioRDM API.

egrid.name: EPA eGRID 2023 (Revision 2)
egrid.citation: US EPA, Emissions & Generation Resource Integrated Database (eGRID) 2023 rev2, released June 12, 2025
egrid.notes: eGRID2024 not released as of 2026-07-10. Sheet names carry the year suffix (PLNT23/SRL23/ST23); expect PLNT24/... when 2024 lands.

egrid_subregions_shp.name: EPA eGRID2023 subregion shapefiles (primary + multiple-subregion overlaps)
egrid_subregions_shp.attribution: US EPA, eGRID2023 Subregions GIS shapefiles
egrid_subregions_shp.citation: US EPA, eGRID2023 Subregions GIS shapefiles (January 2025)

aqueduct40.name: WRI Aqueduct 4.0 Water Risk Atlas (baseline monthly + future annual, sub-basin CSVs)
aqueduct40.attribution: WRI Aqueduct 4.0 (Kuzma et al. 2023), CC BY 4.0
aqueduct40.citation: Kuzma et al. (2023), Aqueduct 4.0: Updated Decision-Relevant Global Water Risk Indicators, WRI
aqueduct40.notes: Committed CSVs are the pinned snapshot (the old raw.githubusercontent URLs are dead). Canonical zip is ~262 MB and contains the same y2023m07d05 files. WRI re-runs the model every ~3-4 years; a 5.0 is plausible 2026-27.

hydrobasins_lev06.name: HydroBASINS level-6 sub-basin polygons, standard, NA + Arctic (HydroSHEDS)
hydrobasins_lev06.license: HydroSHEDS license (free incl. commercial use, attribution required)
hydrobasins_lev06.redistribution_notes: HydroSHEDS license permits redistribution with attribution; committed zips in data/raw-data/ are the pinned snapshot.
hydrobasins_lev06.citation: Lehner, B., Grill, G. (2013). Global river hydrography and network routing: baseline data and new approaches to study the world's large river systems. Hydrological Processes, 27(15), 2171-2186
hydrobasins_lev06.notes: COMPATIBILITY PIN: Aqueduct 4.0's pfaf_id is built on HydroBASINS v1. A future HydroBASINS v2 (re-derived on the TanDEM-X DEM) would re-compute Pfafstetter codes and BREAK the join. Alert-only; never auto-update.

fractracker.name: FracTracker Alliance US Data Centers Tracker
fractracker.license: Free for non-commercial use with credit to FracTracker Alliance (fractracker.org/terms-of-service)
fractracker.redistribution_notes: Facility-level FracTracker-derived columns (mw_capacity, mw_source, match_dist_m, ft_status, qa_operator_mismatch) are distributed ONLY in data/derived-data/fractracker_match.csv — never inside the ODbL outputs, whose share-alike terms cannot absorb non-commercial content. Written permission requested (ROADMAP 1.0.1) to (a) include matched fields in the open derived dataset and (b) archive dated snapshots on Zenodo; if denied, these fields become regenerate-by-script only and the committed snapshot/sidecar are withdrawn.
fractracker.citation: FracTracker Alliance, U.S. Data Centers Tracker (accessed 2026-07-10), fractracker.org/data-centers
fractracker.notes: Rolling dataset (live Google Sheet; ArcGIS feature service data_centers_v4_agol_all). The dated snapshot committed in data/raw-data/ is the reproducibility anchor. Known data typo: one row dated 3036 — dates clamped in QA.

census_cartographic_boundaries.name: US Census cartographic boundary shapefiles (state/county, 1:20m)
census_cartographic_boundaries.attribution: US Census Bureau, Cartographic Boundary Files
census_cartographic_boundaries.redistribution_notes: Fetched at runtime by code/generate_charts.py and cached in data/shapefiles/ (gitignored); not committed.
census_cartographic_boundaries.citation: US Census Bureau, 2025 Cartographic Boundary Files
census_cartographic_boundaries.notes: Fetched at runtime by code/generate_charts.py and cached in data/shapefiles/ (gitignored). Annual cadence; expect GENZ2026 ~April 2027.
